specific_concerns: The quotable_line 'Your right is to the deploy, not to the launch metrics' is sloganic by design and could, if extracted from context (e.g. on social media without the full layer), read as LinkedIn-tier reduction of niṣkāma-karma to a productivity koan.

The closing line 'Right action, disowned authorship of the result, no flight into the safe-feeling tasks' has slight aphoristic cadence — in another context it could be misread as a slogan, but it is anchored by the preceding First/Second/Third structure that names doctrinal stakes.
verdict_reason: v3.1 verification. The engineering layer survives trivialization-check because (a) it preserves the THREE distinct prohibitions of the verse — explicitly First/Second/Third — rather than flattening them to a single 'detach from outcomes' slogan; (b) it treats karma-phala-hetuḥ with appropriate gravity ('bind yourself as the agent of consequences you cannot control') rather than as a productivity tip; (c) it includes a falsifiability clause that explicitly defends against the most common cheapening ('detachment from outcome is not detachment from feedback'); (d) it uses dharma-language register ('it is rejected here just as firmly as the grasping for fruits') rather than productivity-language for the inaction-clause; and (e) the source pack keeps Sanskrit, anvaya, traditional_meaning, and commentary attributions visible alongside the engineering layer — the verse is honored, not just used. v3.1 also removes the prior 'make the work itself the motive' phrasing that previously brushed a productivity-tip register, which lowers severity from 3 to 2. A serious practitioner reading the full package would find the verse engaged-with, not reduced. Severity 2, below the FAIL threshold of 4. PASS.
